title: Dexcom serializable EGV / glucose payload (OGT MVP)
description: Vendor-shaped JSON suitable for mapping from Dexcom API responses or app caches into OGIS glucose.reading. Not a copy of vendor JSON Schema.

event_id.description: Stable record id (e.g. Dexcom transaction / EGV id, UUID string).

subject_id.description: Subject in producer namespace (mirrors canonical glucose.reading.subject_id).

system_time.description: Dexcom systemTime (UTC) for the reading; maps to observed_at.

display_time.description: Optional displayTime when it differs from system_time; maps to source_recorded_at.

trend_arrow.description: Dexcom trend token (e.g. flat, singleUp, fortyFiveDown); mapped to OGIS trend.direction.

trend_rate.description: Optional rate of change in trend_rate_unit.

device_model.description: Receiver/transmitter generation label when known (e.g. G6, G7).
